MyGRACE-PhasePlan.NAME: Experience and Docs
MyGRACE-PhasePlan.Goal: Improve user-facing delivery surfaces: email template quality, verify result UX, and repository onboarding documentation.

Steps.step-1: Introduce branded UTF-8-safe magic-link email subject, HTML body, and text fallback.
Steps.step-2: Build a polished verify result page with copy actions, Telegram CTA, and manual MTProto setup instructions.
Steps.step-3: Write root README with project overview, one-script VPS deployment, TLS modes, and troubleshooting basics.

ExitCriteria.Item: Email verification messages are readable, properly encoded, and visually structured.
Verify result page supports copy/paste and manual setup without ambiguity.
README explains one-script deploy flow for a clean VPS.
